_note: Scoped-egress allowlist (D1'). The voice agent may ONLY dial numbers in this list — published county benefits information lines / authorized CBOs that have consented to AI-disclosed informational calls. No applicant cell can ever be dialed; any number not in this list is REFUSED by a deterministic guard before any call is placed.

allowlist.name: CalFresh Benefits Helpline (CDSS, published statewide information line)
San Francisco Human Services Agency — CalFresh information
